name: Orchestrator
description: Prompt router for selected agents. Routes each turn into a task-specific prompt, with optional LLM-based classification.

enabledAgents.description: Only these agent ids use prompt routing. Empty or omitted means all agents.

corePromptFiles.description: Prompt files that are always injected as core rules for every turn.

commonPromptFiles.description: Prompt files that are always injected as common interaction rules for every turn.

classifierModel.description: Optional provider/model ref used only for route classification, for example openai/gpt-5-nano.

defaultRoute.description: Fallback route when no classifier result is available.

llmTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for optional LLM route classification.

maxRoutes.description: Maximum number of routes to inject for one turn.

routes.description: Route registry. Keys are route ids. Each route can override built-in routes or define a new one.

enabled.description: Set false to disable this route.

description.description: Human-readable route description used by LLM classification.

promptFile.description: Absolute path or plugin-root-relative path to the route prompt file.

keywords.description: Rule-based matcher keywords for this route.

enabledAgents.label: Enabled Agents
enabledAgents.help: Only these agent ids receive route-specific prompt injection.

corePromptFiles.label: Core Prompt Files
corePromptFiles.help: These prompt files are always injected before any route-specific prompts.

commonPromptFiles.label: Common Prompt Files
commonPromptFiles.help: These prompt files are always injected as shared interaction rules.

classifierModel.label: Classifier Model
classifierModel.help: Optional provider/model ref used only for route classification.

routes.label: Routes
routes.help: Define or override routes with prompt files and keywords.
